Name: Discord - Send Notification
Description:
Posts a message and/or rich embed to a [Discord](https://discord.com) channel via a [webhook](https://support.discord.com/hc/en-us/articles/228383668-Intro-to-Webhooks). No Discord application or bot is required — create a webhook in the channel's settings (Integrations → Webhooks) and paste its URL into this step.

The embed can automatically colour itself green or red based on the deployment outcome (set Color to `auto` and use this step with a "run always" condition), include Project/Release/Environment fields, and link back to the deployment in Octopus.

Mentions (`@everyone`, roles, users) in message content are suppressed by default to prevent accidental pings from interpolated release notes.

Sets the output variable `MessageId` for use in later steps.

Requires `curl` and either `jq` or `python3` on the worker.

Properties.Octopus.Action.Script.ScriptBody:
#!/bin/bash

# Discord - Send Notification
# Posts a message and/or rich embed to a Discord channel via a webhook.
# API reference: https://discord.com/developers/docs/resources/webhook#execute-webhook

# Read step parameters
WebhookUrl=$(get_octopusvariable "DiscordNotify.WebhookUrl")
Content=$(get_octopusvariable "DiscordNotify.Content")
Username=$(get_octopusvariable "DiscordNotify.Username")
AvatarUrl=$(get_octopusvariable "DiscordNotify.AvatarUrl")
IncludeEmbed=$(get_octopusvariable "DiscordNotify.IncludeEmbed")
EmbedTitle=$(get_octopusvariable "DiscordNotify.EmbedTitle")
EmbedDescription=$(get_octopusvariable "DiscordNotify.EmbedDescription")
EmbedColor=$(get_octopusvariable "DiscordNotify.Color")
IncludeFields=$(get_octopusvariable "DiscordNotify.IncludeDeploymentFields")
SuppressMentions=$(get_octopusvariable "DiscordNotify.SuppressMentions")
ThreadId=$(get_octopusvariable "DiscordNotify.ThreadId")

# System variables used for the auto colour, detail fields, and deployment link
SysProjectName=$(get_octopusvariable "Octopus.Project.Name")
SysReleaseNumber=$(get_octopusvariable "Octopus.Release.Number")
SysEnvironmentName=$(get_octopusvariable "Octopus.Environment.Name")
SysDeploymentError=$(get_octopusvariable "Octopus.Deployment.Error")
SysServerUri=$(get_octopusvariable "Octopus.Web.ServerUri")
SysDeploymentLink=$(get_octopusvariable "Octopus.Web.DeploymentLink")

# Validate required tooling

if ! command -v curl >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "ERROR: curl is required on the worker to run this step." >&2
  exit 1
fi

if command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  JSON_TOOL="jq"
elif command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  JSON_TOOL="python3"
else
  echo "ERROR: jq or python3 is required on the worker to build and parse JSON." >&2
  exit 1
fi

# Prints the JSON-encoded (quoted) form of $1
json_escape() {
  if [[ "$JSON_TOOL" == "jq" ]]; then
    jq -cn --arg v "$1" '$v'
  else
    python3 -c 'import json,sys; print(json.dumps(sys.argv[1]))' "$1"
  fi
}

# Reads JSON on stdin and prints the value at dotted path $1 (empty if missing or null)
json_get() {
  if [[ "$JSON_TOOL" == "jq" ]]; then
    jq -r ".$1 // empty" 2>/dev/null
  else
    python3 -c '
import json, sys
try:
    data = json.load(sys.stdin)
except Exception:
    sys.exit(0)
cur = data
for part in sys.argv[1].split("."):
    if isinstance(cur, dict) and part in cur:
        cur = cur[part]
    else:
        sys.exit(0)
if cur is None:
    sys.exit(0)
print(cur if not isinstance(cur, (dict, list)) else json.dumps(cur))
' "$1"
  fi
}

# Truncates $1 to at most $2 characters, appending an ellipsis when cut
truncate_to() {
  local s="$1" max="$2"
  if (( ${#s} > max )); then
    echo "${s:0:$((max - 1))}…"
  else
    echo "$s"
  fi
}

# Validate required parameters

if [[ -z "$WebhookUrl" ]]; then
  echo "ERROR: WebhookUrl is required." >&2
  exit 1
fi

if [[ ! "$WebhookUrl" =~ ^https://(ptb\.|canary\.)?(discord|discordapp)\.com/api/webhooks/ ]]; then
  echo "ERROR: WebhookUrl does not look like a Discord webhook URL (expected https://discord.com/api/webhooks/...)." >&2
  exit 1
fi

if [[ -z "$Content" && "$IncludeEmbed" != "True" ]]; then
  echo "ERROR: Nothing to send. Provide Content, or enable Include Embed." >&2
  exit 1
fi

# Build the payload

PARTS=()

if [[ -n "$Content" ]]; then
  Content=$(truncate_to "$Content" 2000)
  PARTS+=("\"content\":$(json_escape "$Content")")
fi

[[ -n "$Username" ]] && PARTS+=("\"username\":$(json_escape "$Username")")
[[ -n "$AvatarUrl" ]] && PARTS+=("\"avatar_url\":$(json_escape "$AvatarUrl")")

if [[ "$SuppressMentions" == "True" ]]; then
  PARTS+=("\"allowed_mentions\":{\"parse\":[]}")
fi

if [[ "$IncludeEmbed" == "True" ]]; then
  EPARTS=()

  if [[ -n "$EmbedTitle" ]]; then
    EmbedTitle=$(truncate_to "$EmbedTitle" 256)
    EPARTS+=("\"title\":$(json_escape "$EmbedTitle")")
  fi

  if [[ -n "$EmbedDescription" ]]; then
    EmbedDescription=$(truncate_to "$EmbedDescription" 4096)
    EPARTS+=("\"description\":$(json_escape "$EmbedDescription")")
  fi

  # Link the embed title back to the deployment when running in a deployment context
  if [[ -n "$SysServerUri" && -n "$SysDeploymentLink" ]]; then
    EPARTS+=("\"url\":$(json_escape "${SysServerUri}${SysDeploymentLink}")")
  fi

  # Resolve the embed colour (Discord expects a decimal integer)
  case "$(echo "$EmbedColor" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]')" in
    auto)
    # Green unless the deployment has an error
    if [[ -n "$SysDeploymentError" ]]; then COLOR=15548997; else COLOR=5763719; fi
      ;;
    success) COLOR=5763719 ;;
    failure) COLOR=15548997 ;;
    warning) COLOR=16705372 ;;
    info|"") COLOR=5793266 ;;
    *)
      if [[ "$EmbedColor" =~ ^[0-9]+$ ]]; then
        COLOR="$EmbedColor"
      else
        echo "WARNING: Unrecognised Color '$EmbedColor'; using info blue." >&2
        COLOR=5793266
      fi
      ;;
  esac
  EPARTS+=("\"color\":$COLOR")

  EPARTS+=("\"timestamp\":\"$(date -u '+%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ')\"")

  if [[ "$IncludeFields" == "True" ]]; then
    FIELDS=()
    [[ -n "$SysProjectName" ]] && FIELDS+=("{\"name\":\"Project\",\"value\":$(json_escape "$SysProjectName"),\"inline\":true}")
    [[ -n "$SysReleaseNumber" ]] && FIELDS+=("{\"name\":\"Release\",\"value\":$(json_escape "$SysReleaseNumber"),\"inline\":true}")
    [[ -n "$SysEnvironmentName" ]] && FIELDS+=("{\"name\":\"Environment\",\"value\":$(json_escape "$SysEnvironmentName"),\"inline\":true}")
    if (( ${#FIELDS[@]} > 0 )); then
      EPARTS+=("\"fields\":[$(IFS=,; echo "${FIELDS[*]}")]")
    fi
  fi

  PARTS+=("\"embeds\":[{$(IFS=,; echo "${EPARTS[*]}")}]")
fi

PAYLOAD="{$(IFS=,; echo "${PARTS[*]}")}"

# Build the URL. wait=true makes Discord return the created message so the
# message id can be captured as an output variable.

POST_URL="${WebhookUrl}?wait=true"
if [[ -n "$ThreadId" ]]; then
  POST_URL="${POST_URL}&thread_id=${ThreadId}"
fi

# Send, retrying on rate limiting (HTTP 429)

echo "Sending Discord notification..."
[[ -n "$Content" ]] && echo "  Content : $(truncate_to "$Content" 60)"
[[ "$IncludeEmbed" == "True" && -n "$EmbedTitle" ]] && echo "  Embed   : $EmbedTitle"
[[ -n "$ThreadId" ]] && echo "  Thread  : $ThreadId"
echo ""

MAX_ATTEMPTS=3
ATTEMPT=1

while true; do
  RAW=$(curl --silent --show-error --max-time 60 --write-out $'\n%{http_code}' \
    --request POST "$POST_URL" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --data "$PAYLOAD")

  CURL_EXIT=$?

  if [[ $CURL_EXIT -ne 0 ]]; then
    echo "ERROR: curl request failed (exit code $CURL_EXIT)." >&2
    exit 1
  fi

  HTTP_STATUS=$(echo "$RAW" | tail -n 1)
  RESPONSE=$(echo "$RAW" | sed '$d')

  if [[ "$HTTP_STATUS" == "429" ]]; then
    if (( ATTEMPT >= MAX_ATTEMPTS )); then
      echo "ERROR: Discord rate limited the webhook and retries were exhausted." >&2
      exit 1
    fi
    RETRY_AFTER=$(echo "$RESPONSE" | json_get "retry_after")
    # retry_after can be fractional seconds; round up in plain bash
    WHOLE="${RETRY_AFTER%%.*}"
    if [[ "$WHOLE" =~ ^[0-9]+$ ]]; then
      WAIT_SECONDS=$((WHOLE + 1))
    else
      WAIT_SECONDS=2
    fi
    echo "Rate limited (429); retrying in ${WAIT_SECONDS}s (attempt $((ATTEMPT + 1))/${MAX_ATTEMPTS})..."
    sleep "$WAIT_SECONDS"
    ATTEMPT=$((ATTEMPT + 1))
    continue
  fi

  break
done

if [[ "$HTTP_STATUS" -ge 400 ]]; then
  ERROR_MSG=$(echo "$RESPONSE" | json_get "message")
  ERROR_CODE=$(echo "$RESPONSE" | json_get "code")
  echo "ERROR: Discord API returned an error (HTTP $HTTP_STATUS)." >&2
  [[ -n "$ERROR_CODE" ]] && echo "  Code   : $ERROR_CODE" >&2
  [[ -n "$ERROR_MSG" ]] && echo "  Message: $ERROR_MSG" >&2
  exit 1
fi

MESSAGE_ID=$(echo "$RESPONSE" | json_get "id")

echo "Notification sent successfully."
[[ -n "$MESSAGE_ID" ]] && echo "  Message ID: $MESSAGE_ID"

set_octopusvariable "MessageId" "$MESSAGE_ID"

Parameters.Name: DiscordNotify.WebhookUrl
Parameters.Label: Webhook URL
Parameters.HelpText: The Discord webhook URL (Channel Settings → Integrations → Webhooks). Consider binding this to a sensitive project variable (e.g. `#{Discord.WebhookUrl}`) so it can be scoped per environment and rotated in one place.

Parameters.Name: DiscordNotify.Content
Parameters.Label: Message Content
Parameters.HelpText: Plain message text (supports Discord markdown). Optional when Include Embed is enabled. Maximum 2000 characters — longer values are truncated.

Parameters.Name: DiscordNotify.Username
Parameters.Label: Username Override
Parameters.HelpText: Overrides the webhook's configured display name. Leave blank to use the name configured on the webhook.

Parameters.Name: DiscordNotify.AvatarUrl
Parameters.Label: Avatar URL Override
Parameters.HelpText: Overrides the webhook's configured avatar image. Leave blank to use the avatar configured on the webhook.

Parameters.Name: DiscordNotify.IncludeEmbed
Parameters.Label: Include Embed
Parameters.HelpText: If enabled, sends a rich embed with the title, description, colour, timestamp, a link to the deployment, and optional deployment detail fields.

Parameters.Name: DiscordNotify.EmbedTitle
Parameters.Label: Embed Title
Parameters.HelpText: Title of the embed. Maximum 256 characters — longer values are truncated.

Parameters.Name: DiscordNotify.EmbedDescription
Parameters.Label: Embed Description
Parameters.HelpText: Body text of the embed (supports Discord markdown). Maximum 4096 characters — longer values are truncated.

Parameters.Name: DiscordNotify.Color
Parameters.Label: Color
Parameters.HelpText: Colour of the embed's side bar. `auto` picks green or red based on whether the deployment has an error — useful with a "run always" step condition. A raw decimal colour value is also accepted.

DisplaySettings.Octopus.SelectOptions:
auto|Auto (green on success, red on failure)
success|Green
failure|Red
warning|Yellow
info|Blue

Parameters.Name: DiscordNotify.IncludeDeploymentFields
Parameters.Label: Include Deployment Fields
Parameters.HelpText: If enabled, adds Project, Release, and Environment fields to the embed (fields without a value, e.g. Release during a runbook run, are omitted).

Parameters.Name: DiscordNotify.SuppressMentions
Parameters.Label: Suppress Mentions
Parameters.HelpText: If enabled, `@everyone`, role, and user mentions in the message content will not ping anyone. Disable only if you intentionally want the notification to ping.

Parameters.Name: DiscordNotify.ThreadId
Parameters.Label: Thread ID
Parameters.HelpText: Optional ID of a thread (or forum post) in the webhook's channel to post into. Leave blank to post to the channel itself.
